title: rate-signal output
description: Canonical structured output for the rate-signal skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered return table + signals block + confidence + take) is described in references/rendering.md.

as_of.description: Local as-of date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

window_days.description: Lookback window in trading days for the curve reads (default 60).

short_window_days.description: Short sub-window (trading days) used by the momentum read. Scales from window as max(5, window // 4).

n_instruments.description: Count of basket members (4: SHY, IEF, TLT, TIP).

instruments.description: Per-instrument window return and observation count.

return_pct.description: Total return (decimal) over window_days. Null when history is insufficient.

signals.description: The four curve reads over window_days.

curve.description: Curve slope from SHY vs TLT combined with TLT direction: four-way bull/bear steepening/flattening.

rate_direction.description: bull = long rates falling (TLT up); bear = long rates rising (TLT down).

slope.description: steepening = short (SHY) outperforming long (TLT); flattening = long outperforming short.

real_yield.description: Real-yield direction from TIP alone. TIP is indexed to real yields, so TIP price up = real yields falling, TIP down = rising.

tip_return.description: TIP total return over the window (decimal).

breakeven.description: Inflation-expectations proxy: breakevens = nominal minus real, from TIP vs IEF. TIP outperforming IEF = breakevens widening = inflation expectations rising.

tip_minus_ief_bps.description: (TIP return - IEF return) over the window, in basis points. Proportional to the change in breakevens.

momentum.description: Long end (TLT) vs belly (IEF) momentum over the short sub-window. Divergent when they disagree.

confidence.description: Confidence in the curve read from cross-signal agreement.

level.description: high when real-yield and momentum reads both agree with the curve's rate direction; low when they conflict.

take.description: One-sentence rates note composed from the curve label and confidence read.

tier_caveats.description: Honest caveats: rate-limit flags, missing history, proxy limitations.
